title: Coinbase CEO: 4 Billion people Unbrokered
snippet: Wu Blockchain (@WuBlockchain): Coinbase CEO: 4 Billion people Unbrokered Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong speaking to Bloomberg, tokenization will bring the same revolution to traditional equities.
